sectionOrderRules: Hero must state the mission in plain language and include a primary CTA such as registrering, kontakt or engagemang.
Uppdragsintroduktion should explain who the organisation exists for and what kind of support or activity it offers.
Insatsoversikt must be concrete and visitor-oriented, not abstract value statements.
Förtroende should rely on transparent facts such as organisationsnummer, 90-konto or årsredovisning when available, and must appear before the final CTA.
Sections must avoid repeating the same appeal for support or engagement in multiple blocks.
Insatser intro must connect the mission to the actual support, activities or counselling offered.
Insatslista items must describe real forms of support, participation or guidance in specific terms.
Hur-det-fungerar should explain practical next steps such as registration, eligibility, schedule or contact pathway without implying guaranteed outcomes.
If present, målgrupper should clarify who each offer is for and any important limitations.
Engagera intro must explain why engagement matters for the mission and what kinds of participation are possible.
Engagemangsformer must list concrete options such as bli medlem, volontär, delta i aktivitet or stöd verksamheten, depending on the dossier.
Registrering CTA should be the main conversion point on this route and may point to form, email or another clear next step.
The page must not pressure vulnerable visitors; wording should remain supportive and informative.
Om oss berättelse must be specific to the organisation's background, local context or social mission.
Arbetssätt should describe how the organisation works in practice, including collaboration, accessibility or participation where relevant.
Team may show staff, board or key volunteers depending on the organisation's structure.
Förtroende should prioritise transparent organisational facts over generic claims.
Kontaktinfo must include real contact ways such as email, phone, address or equivalent organisational contact points.
Kontaktformular should be suitable for general inquiries and must not promise immediate social support unless the organisation actually offers it.
Besök och tider should clarify opening hours, drop-in times or how to get in touch when staffed hours vary.
If a map is shown, it should support the contact information rather than replace full written address details.
